title: Hive Digital Completes Site Development in Paraguay, Achieves Hashrate Milestone
text: Hive Digital announced completion of the second development phase at its Yguazú, Paraguay mining facility, reaching a hashrate of 18 EH/s. The company entered Paraguay in June 2024 and accomplished this milestone ahead of schedule. The operation utilizes 200MW of hydroelectric power from the Itaipu dam and deploys Bitmain S21+ Hydro ASIC miners with water-based cooling systems. According to the announcement, the site now produces over 8.5 BTC daily. CFO Darcy Daubaras stated the company remains focused on delivering strong and sustainable performance while driving operational efficiency for shareholder value. The company is advancing its Valenzuela site with 100MW capacity and aims to surpass 25 EH/s hashrate by Thanksgiving, projecting approximately 12 BTC daily production at current difficulty levels. Executive Chairman Frank Holmes previously indicated Paraguay operations would increase overall production by 400%.
